body: {"rationale":"Strong doc-only bead. Passes 7 of 8 rubric criteria: title is imperative and names subsystem+change; description has PROBLEM, ROOT CAUSE WITH file:line (ADR-023:122-150 and FEAT-010:112-145), PROPOSED FIX, and NON-SCOPE; AC items are numbered and each is verifiable; labels include phase, area, kind, and cross-refs (adr:023, spec:FEAT-010); parent and deps are explicit; no /tmp references; agent can identify the two target files and what to add without operator hand-holding. Single deduction: AC item 7 is self-referential — it says 'Documentation-only waiver is stated in closing notes' but there are no separate closing notes; the waiver statement IS the AC item, which is circular and slightly confusing for an autonomous agent parsing acceptance criteria.","score":7,"suggested_fixes":["Rewrite AC item 7 to be a plain self-contained statement rather than a forward-reference to a section that does not exist: e.g. 'No Go test required — this bead modifies documentation files only (documentation-only waiver); if any generated code references are edited, add a corresponding go test -run filter.'"],"waivers_applied":["documentation-only: no go test -run filter required because the bead touches only docs/ files and no Go source"]}
